grades.expectation: Response specifies 12 months bank statements for savings showing accumulation pattern
grades.reason: Explicitly states '12 months' bank/building society statements' and specifically mentions 'showing accumulation pattern, not just a snapshot'

grades.expectation: Response requires giftor's ID and giftor's bank statements (not just the buyer's)
grades.reason: Clearly requires 'Giftor ID (each parent contributing)' and 'Giftor bank statements' with 3-6 months statements from each parent's accounts

grades.expectation: Response requires a signed gift letter confirming no obligation to repay
grades.reason: Explicitly requires 'Signed gift letter' that 'Must expressly confirm: No obligation to repay (i.e., not a loan)'

grades.expectation: Response mentions risk-based approach (not tick-box compliance)
grades.reason: Opens with emphasis on 'risk-based (not tick-box)' approach and uses risk-based language throughout

grades.expectation: Response mentions record-keeping period of 5 years from end of transaction
grades.reason: Explicitly states 'retain CDD/SoF/SoW and supporting records for 5 years from the end of the business relationship/transaction'
